## Summary / 变更摘要

<!-- What changed and why? / 修改了什么，为什么？ -->

## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run check:release`
- [ ] `cargo fmt --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`

## Risk and user impact / 风险与用户影响

<!-- Include user-visible changes, repair safety implications, and rollback notes when relevant. -->

- [ ] I kept the diff focused and updated `CHANGELOG.md` when appropriate.
- [ ] I updated both Chinese and English user-facing documentation when applicable.
- [ ] I removed personal paths, device IDs, and other sensitive data from logs and screenshots.
